name: Coconut Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crust: In a medium-sized bowl, combine the cracker crumbs and butter. Blend well with fingers, fork, or pastry blender. Press or pat the mixture onto the bottom and sides of a well-buttered 10-inch springform pan. Chill in the freezer or refrigerator for 30 minutes.
2. Filling: In a large bowl, beat the cottage cheese, sugar, coconut extract, and 1 egg until smooth. Add the remaining 3 eggs, one at a time, and beat until very smooth. Add the sour cream and heavy cream and continue to beat until very creamy and smooth. Pour the mixture into the chilled pan.
3. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 1-1/4 hours. Transfer the cake to a wire rack and allow to cool for 30 minutes.
4. Topping: In a small mixing bowl, combine the sour cream, sugar, shredded coconut, and beat until smooth. Spread the mixture evenly over the top of the cooled cake. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for an additional 5 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool completely.
5. Remove the sides of the springform pan and decorate the top of the cake with a cherry. Refrigerate overnight. Serve chilled, allowing at least 2 hours before serving.
